 For other nation u can ask whether there is going to

 How will be the fiscal deficit, export/ imports and
GDP of India?
 How is going to be stock markets?
 How will be sports side?
 How will be health of the country? Is there going to
be any epidemics? The following prediction was a hit
when the poultry industry was in doldrums after the
SARS scare- an epidemic from astrological perspective.
SARS scare!
Tuesday, 13 May , 2003, 00:00
SARS (Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome) is the new epidemic that is creating
havoc world over. Already more than 500 people have been reported dead across the
globe, and few have been declared SARS positive in India. Our astrologer K
Gopalakrishnan looks at the chart and comes out with some positive news.
Rahu is in Rishabha, and it will move in to Mesha in the 9th month (September 2003).
By this time SARS will be well in control, and also news about SARS will wither off.
India will not have major problems.
